[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000100 1
1 1100000 2
2 1010000 2
3 0100000 1
4 1111001 5
5 0100011 3
6 0110001 3
7 1111110 6

01 10 1111110 6 match 7
12 21 1110100 4
23 32 1110000 3
34 43 1110000 3
45 54 1111001 5 match 4
56 65 1111011 6
67 76 0110011 4
70 07 1111111 a

02 20 1111110 6 match 7
13 31 1110100 4
24 42 1100000 2 match 1
35 53 1111001 5 match 4
46 64 0100011 3 match 5
57 75 1111001 5 match 4
60 06 1111111 a
71 17 0110101 4

03 30 1111110 6 match 7
14 41 0110100 3
25 52 1111001 5 match 4
36 63 1110011 5
47 74 0110001 3 match 6
50 05 1111111 a
61 16 0110111 5
72 27 1110001 4

04 40 1111110 6 match 7
15 51 1111101 6
26 62 1100011 4
37 73 1110001 4
